children.id: execute_task tool tier: filtered==raw (no noise) → filtered output, exit=code
execute_task non-tool executable tier: raw output, exit=code, decision
execute_task threads the resolved root into route_task and plan_run
plan_run ollama tier: empty command → 'and' guard falls through to fallback
plan_run tool tier: exact command, dry-run and executable
execute_task tool tier: weak rg + RAG fallback → exact output, exit 0, decision
execute_task tool tier: filtered≠raw, no RAG → note only, exit=code, decision
plan_run ollama tier: exact command, hint suffix, wrapper read_only
_tool_output_weak: exact truth table across filtered/exit-code branches
execute_task tool tier: filtered≠raw with exactly 3 lines → no RAG append (kills <3 boundary)
plan_run unknown tier: fallback text, not executable, decision preserved
_rag_fallback_output: first call threads root; second call threads task/root
plan_run cursor tier: exact guidance text, not executable, decision preserved
plan_run rag tier: threads task/root/domains into search_rag, decision preserved
plan_run ollama tier: no wrapper + non-readonly decision → not executable
execute_plan with no command returns exit 0 and the dry-run output
execute_task cursor tier: exact refuse text + exit 1 + decision preserved
plan_run python tier: no wrapper + non-readonly decision → not executable
plan_run python tier: root-prefixed command threads real root + wrapper read_only
execute_task tool tier: weak rg + no RAG → raw output, exit=code, decision
execute_task non-executable tier: final execute_plan output, exit=code, decision
execute_task tool tier: filtered≠raw, short → appends RAG (exact note, exit 0)
search tool: invalid context resets to default and no-hit skips summary
